name: Bandit Camp
description: A rudimentary fortified camp. It smells like roasted meat and danger.

guaranteed_items.name: Small Chest
guaranteed_items.description: A locked wooden chest. It surely contained something valuable.

name: Mystic Shrine
description: An ancient altar surrounded by glowing stones. You feel a magical energy in the air.

guaranteed_items.name: Glowing Dust
guaranteed_items.description: A mysterious dust gathered from the altar.

name: Forgotten Crypt
description: A stone entrance half sunk into the earth that exhales freezing air.

guaranteed_items.name: Ancient Bone
guaranteed_items.description: A dense bone that is cold to the touch.

name: Mercenary Camp
description: Military tents organized efficiently. There are loose weapons closely guarded.
